nodes.title: Input_Negative
widgets_values:
letterbox, black bars, cinematic bars, pillarbox, border, vignette,
blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles, unrealistic, plastic, fake, out-of-focus, low-detail, 3-arms, extra legs, walking backwards, slow motion, slowed time.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
VISUAL STYLE: Arri Alexa, static, shallow depth of field, Rembrandt lighting, teal and gold colour grade, film grain, photorealistic.

ENVIRONMENT: Deserted beach at dusk. Fine sand, scattered driftwood. Gentle breeze. Ambient sound: distant ocean waves, seagulls.

CHARACTERS: A dancer. Lean build, tanned skin, long dark hair. Wearing a flowing linen dress. Confident, playful demeanor.

ACTION BREAKDOWN:
Shot 1 — 4s. CS — RA, Dolly forward slowly as she turns her back to the camera playfully and lifts her skirt to show her buttocks and g-string panties.

nodes.title: Negative Prompt 2 (Audio) (NAG only)
widgets_values: underwater, echo, muffled, faded, distorted, distortion, feedback, low-quality, garbled, warbling, crackle, hiss, static, clipping, background noise, robotic, tinny, hum, buzz

nodes.title: Input_Positive
widgets_values: A young woman in a shopping mall raises her phone to show the screen to the camera and speaks, staying in place. She looks directly at the camera the whole time, smiling. Only her arm and head move. She says: "Check this out!" People walk on the escalator behind her, soft indoor lighting.
